recommendations.title: Parallels
recommendations.overview: An underground MMA fighter must confront his sister and his past in an adventure through parallel universes

recommendations.title: Prometheus
recommendations.overview: A team of explorers discover a clue to the origins of mankind on Earth, leading them on a journey to the darkest corners of the universe. There, they must fight a terrifying battle to save the future of the human race.

recommendations.title: The Furies
recommendations.overview: A young woman faces her darkest fears with seven other unwilling participants in a deadly game — a game that can only have one winner.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Escape from Planet Earth
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Adventure, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Astronaut Scorch Supernova finds himself caught in a trap when he responds to an SOS from a notoriously dangerous alien planet.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: Final Fantasy: The Spirits Within
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Action, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Animation
recommendations.overview: Led by a strange dream, scientist Aki Ross struggles to collect the eight spirits in the hope of creating a force powerful enough to protect the planet. With the aid of the Deep Eyes Squadron and her mentor, Dr. Sid, Aki must save the Earth from its

recommendations.title: The Dark Tower
recommendations.overview: A boy haunted by visions of a parallel world aids its disillusioned guardian in preventing the destruction of the nexus of universes known as the Dark Tower.

recommendations.title: Babylon 5: The River of Souls
recommendations.overview: A group of Soul Hunters come to Babylon 5 demanding the return of something that was stolen from them.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.
